about.title: About Us - Pharmacy Academy
about.description: Learn more about Pharmacy Academy, an online learning hub for pharmaceutical education.
about.keywords: about us, Pharmacy Academy, pharmacy education, pharmacists

aboutUs.missionDescription1: Pharmacy Academy is committed to being a comprehensive learning center for pharmaceutical sciences. We believe that continuing education is essential for every pharmacist to provide quality healthcare services to the public.
aboutUs.missionDescription2: Our courses are designed by experts in each field to provide up-to-date knowledge that can be applied in real-world practice.
aboutUs.visionDescription: We aim to be the number one online learning platform for pharmaceutical sciences in Thailand, focusing on developing the potential of pharmacists in all fields.
aboutUs.visionPoint2: Content updated with latest academic standards
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Join over 1,000 pharmacists who choose to learn with us

hero.description: Easily accumulate Continuing Pharmacy Education (CPE) credits through certified quality online courses
